hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" || exit 1; test -d apps/draft-assistant/frontend/node_modules || exit 0; staged_files=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$staged_files"' EXIT; git diff --name-only --cached -- apps/draft-assistant/frontend/ > "$staged_files"; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run fmt 2>&1; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run lint:fix 2>&1; while IFS= read -r file; do test -e "$file" && git add -- "$file"; done < "$staged_files"; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run fmt:check 2>&1 && pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run lint 2>&1
